metadata.description: Marketplace for the kb-memory Claude Code plugin.

plugins.name: kb-memory
plugins.description: Read/write protocol and ergonomics for a Graphiti-backed memory MCP: a skill (file-vs-graph rule, write triggers, bi-temporal discipline, token-budget heuristics), /kb-search and /kb-write slash commands, and a PreToolUse hook that blocks add_memory writes to indexer-owned canonical groups.
